proposals.sql: SELECT * FROM player_attributes WHERE preferred_foot = 'left' AND potential > 70 AND dribbling > 65;
proposals.natural_language: Find left-footed players with high potential (>70) and good dribbling skills (>65).

proposals.sql: SELECT * FROM player_attributes WHERE overall_rating > 60 AND finishing > 60 AND preferred_foot = 'right';
proposals.natural_language: List right-footed players with decent overall rating and finishing ability (both above 60).
